description: SessionStart guard: first registers the br8n resume-cue statusline in the user's GLOBAL Claude settings (idempotent, never clobbers a user's own statusLine) so the cross-repo cue shows in every repo; then on a new repo, seeds a br8n KB and offers the KG schema wizard; on an existing KB, asks the drift detector whether to surface a (debounced, non-blocking) schema-(re)design offer. SessionStart also installs the commit-boundary auto-capture hook (a post-commit re-anchor; no continuous watcher). UserPromptSubmit injects the current repo+branch KB preamble before each turn (silent, fail-safe).
